theme.description: A playful, culturally rich interface that feels like a tactile, folkloric board game. Combines the high-energy, colorful aesthetic of 'Vibrant Play' with traditional Romani motifs (deep reds, golds, sapphire blues) over a warm, paper-like background.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#D92525]
hierarchy.label: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.1em] font-bold text-[#D92525]
hierarchy.phrase_reveal: text-3xl sm:text-5xl font-black text-[#F5A623] drop-shadow-md rotate-[-2deg]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous padding. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 to give the game a breathable, open feel.

level_select_screen.strategy: Asymmetrical Bento Grid. Avoid a monotonous 5x6 grid. Use grid-cols-4 md:grid-cols-6 lg:grid-cols-8 with gap-6. Make milestone levels (10, 20, 30) col-span-2 row-span-2 to emphasize progression.
level_select_screen.item_style: Tactile, rounded tiles (rounded-3xl) with subtle 3D 'clay' shadows (shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(209,199,177,1)]). Active levels lift up on hover.

gameplay_screen.layout: Mobile-first flex column. Top: Header (Progress & Reset). Middle: The Word Search Grid (aspect-square, max-w-2xl mx-auto). Bottom: Found words tag cloud.
gameplay_screen.grid_style: Dense but legible. Grid container has rounded-2xl border-4 border-[#E8DFCA]. Individual letter tiles are transparent until selected. Selection strikethrough uses a pill-shaped vibrant SVG overlay.

surface_strategies.buttons: Neumorphic / Clay feel. Background #D92525, heavy bottom shadow shadow-[0_4px_0_0_#A31A1A] for a pressable tactile feel. On active, translate-y-1 and remove shadow.
surface_strategies.modals: Soft glassmorphism with strong borders: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-2 border-[#E8DFCA] rounded-3xl.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements should scale slightly (scale-105) and rotate slightly (rotate-1) to feel playful.
motion_and_interaction.strikethrough: When a word is successfully found, draw an SVG pill/line across the letters with an animation duration of 0.3s ease-out.
motion_and_interaction.reveal_animation: CRITICAL: When the last word is found, fade out all found words. The leftover letters should scale up, turn gold (#F5A623), and smoothly translate to the center of the screen to form the funny Romani phrase. Trigger confetti explosion simultaneously.

components.word_search_grid: Custom HTML/React component. Needs pointer-events handling for drag-to-select (mouse/touch). Do not use Shadcn for the raw grid engine.
components.progress_bar: Shadcn Progress component. Customize with rounded-full, h-4, bg-[#E8DFCA], and indicator bg-[#F5A623].
components.word_list: Use flex-wrap gap-3 for words. Unfound words: bg-white text-[#5C4B4B] border-2 border-[#E8DFCA]. Found words: bg-[#2B8C44] text-white border-transparent scale-95 opacity-80 line-through.
components.icons: lucide-react for UI icons (settings, reset, hint). Use thick, bold stroke widths (2.5 or 3).

image_urls.description: Colorful floral border pattern with folk art style. Use as a low-opacity (5-10%) watermark background on the level select and gameplay screens to give it a culturally rich vibe.
Multicolor confetti. Use as an overlay image or reference for the CSS/Canvas confetti particle effect when completing a level.

libraries_to_add: framer-motion (for the leftover letters dragging into place)

accessibility_and_testing.guidelines: Ensure high contrast on the word search letters (Ink Black on Grid Tile Bg). Maintain minimum 4.5:1 contrast. Use focus rings for keyboard navigation.
